'''sakapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvaser|uvaser]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvaser|uvaser]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sakapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sækæpæth|sækæpæth]] || [[word:sækæpæj|sækæpæj]] || [[word:sækæpæsh|sækæpæsh]] || [[word:sækæpæ|sækæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakakapath|sakakapath]] || [[word:sakakapaj|sakakapaj]] || [[word:sakakapash|sakakapash]] || [[word:sakakapa|sakakapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakapath|sakapath]] || [[word:sakapaj|sakapaj]] || [[word:sakapash|sakapash]] || [[word:sakapa|sakapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakafpath|sakafpath]] || [[word:sakafpaj|sakafpaj]] || [[word:sakafpash|sakafpash]] || [[word:sakafpaf|sakafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sakapatha|sakapatha]] || [[word:sakapaja|sakapaja]] || [[word:sakapasha|sakapasha]] || [[word:sakapaka|sakapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sakapath|sakapath]] || [[word:sakapaj|sakapaj]] || [[word:sakapash|sakapash]] || [[word:sakapa|sakapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sakapathal|sakapathal]] || [[word:sakapajal|sakapajal]] || [[word:sakapashal|sakapashal]] || [[word:sakapakal|sakapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sakapathatha|sakapathatha]] || [[word:sakapajaja|sakapajaja]] || [[word:sakapashasha|sakapashasha]] || [[word:sakapaka|sakapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sakapathan|sakapathan]] || [[word:sakapajan|sakapajan]] || [[word:sakapashan|sakapashan]] || [[word:sakapakan|sakapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sakapathaoro|sakapathaoro]] || [[word:sakapajaoro|sakapajaoro]] || [[word:sakapashaoro|sakapashaoro]] || [[word:sakapakaoro|sakapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
